audio_description: The audio clip features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with a moderate pace. There are no noticeable prosodic variations or non-speech sounds.
temporal_description: A group of men in dark uniforms, some with visible ID badges, are descending a staircase in a dimly lit indoor setting. One man in a light-colored shirt walks ahead, his back to the camera, while others follow closely behind. The men maintain a steady, purposeful pace, with their gazes mostly forward or slightly downward. A few individuals stand on an upper level, observing the group as they pass. The staircase has metal railings and is surrounded by white walls, with overhead lighting casting shadows.
